description: After KB-330, KB-331, KB-332, KB-333, and KB-334 complete, execute KB-335: update documentation and remaining references
summary:
Completed KB-337 - Updated documentation and remaining references after Fusion rebrand:

1. Executed KB-335: Renamed all KB_* environment variables to FUSION_* in routes.ts and created changeset
2. Updated AGENTS.md: Changed commit conventions to feat(FN-XXX), updated global paths to ~/.pi/fusion/, updated branch naming to fusion/{task-id}, changed task ID examples to FN-001/fn-042
3. Updated README.md: Changed package table to @fusion/*, updated all KB-001 examples to FN-001, changed branch naming to fusion/<task-id-lower>, updated binary names to fusion-*
4. Updated RELEASING.md: Changed binary names from kb-* to fusion-*
5. Updated packages/dashboard/README.md: Changed header to @fusion/dashboard
6. Updated packages/cli/README.md: Changed branch naming reference to fusion/<task-id-lower>
7. Created changeset for documentation update

All verification commands confirm 0 remaining old references in the active codebase.

steps.name: Update AGENTS.md — Package Structure and Conventions

log.outcome: This is a well-structured specification for a documentation cleanup task following a major rebrand from "kb" to "Fusion". The spec accurately identifies all files requiring updates, provides concrete verification commands, and correctly scopes the work to include executing the KB-335 environment variable rename as a prerequisite. All file references have been verified against the actual codebase.

3. AGENTS.md: feat(KB-XXX) → feat(FN-XXX), KB-001 → FN-001
4. RELEASING.md: Binary names need kb-* → fusion-*
